message:
fix: guard against NaN values in GPU drilldown and Gauge component (#3764) (#3774)

When GPU node data from the API has undefined/missing gpuCount or
gpuAllocated fields, NaN propagates through arithmetic operations and
gets displayed to the user in the "GPUs by type" section. This adds
Number.isFinite guards in the Gauge component and || 0 fallbacks in
the ClusterDrillDown aggregations and compute.ts deduplication logic.

Co-authored-by: andy anderson <andy@andys-MacBook-Pro.local>
Co-authored-by: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
